message:
feat(fcp): add policy/release schemas and configurable gossip limits

Add three new FCP protocol JSON schemas for governance workflows:
- PolicyBundle_v1: Signed policy bundles for zone-level governance,
  enabling cryptographic verification of policy chains with sequence
  ordering and previous-bundle references for audit trails
- ReleaseManifest_v1: Connector release attestation with channel
  assignments, capability requirements, and cryptographic signatures
  for secure software distribution across the mesh
- RolloutPolicy_v1: Canary-based deployment policies with success
  thresholds (min success rate, max error rate), automatic rollback
  rules, and configurable observation windows for safe deployments

Extend fcp-conformance with validation functions for all new schemas,
plus comprehensive test coverage including:
- Positive validation of well-formed documents
- CBOR determinism verification (identical hashes for same content)
- Rejection of invalid digest algorithms (requires blake3-256)
- Rejection of invalid version formats
- Rejection of missing required fields

Make gossip protocol limits configurable via GossipConfig instead of
hardcoded constants. Previously, request validation always used
MAX_OBJECT_IDS_PER_REQUEST (1024) regardless of deployment needs.
Now operators can tune max_objects_per_request and max_symbols_per_request
to balance network efficiency vs. memory usage for their specific mesh
topology. The hardcoded constants remain as upper bounds that config
values cannot exceed, ensuring DoS resistance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
